rulings.Case Title: M&M INVESTMENT PARTNERS LLC VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A., AS TRUSTEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 13, 2013, line 8. To Show Cause Re: Contempt. GRANTED. Defendant fails to provide any evidence in support of its opposition. Defendant failed to cure its violation of the April 3, 2013 Court order immediately after notice of violation. See Brenda Cruz Keith Letter dated 10/15/2013 and John Sowers Declaration 7-8. Defendant shall pay $1,000 to the Court within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff is entitled to its attorney's fees. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL YOUNESSIAN VS. PAUL NOUNOU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Requiring Pltf To Post Security Under Ccp 391 For Stya Of Proceeding And For Order Requiring Pltf To Obtain A Pre-Filing Order;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 13, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT PAUL NOUNOU's Motion For Order Requiring Plaintiff To Post Security Under Ccp 391 For Stay Of Proceeding And For Order Requiring Plaintiff To Obtain A Pre-Filing Order; DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden and show that Plaintiff is a vexatious litigant within the meaning of CCP 391(a)(1) and/or CCP 391(a)(2). Specifically, Defendant failed to show (1) more than two attempts to relitigate. i.e. that Court's June 3, 2013 ruling in case CGC-12-521982 was "final" at the time Plaintiff filed his motions to reinstate/vacate on 6/28/13 and 7/11/2013 See Holcomb.; and that (2) within the past 7 years 5 cases have been finally determined against Plaintiff and/or unjustifiably not brought to trial within 2 years. = (501/REQ)
